treatment_information.specific_treatment: Left hemithyroidectomy, parathyroid autotransplantation, intraoperative nerve monitoring
treatment_information.treatment_response: Positive; the patient tolerated the surgery well with adequate pain control and was ambulatory post-surgery.

treatment_timeline.event: Patient presented for left hemithyroidectomy due to symptomatic thyroid nodule.
Surgery performed: Left hemithyroidectomy, parathyroid autotransplantation, intraoperative nerve monitoring.
Discharge from the inpatient general surgery unit with home medications prescribed.

patient_outcome.follow_up_details: Follow up with Dr. ___ at the appointment listed below.
patient_outcome.quality_of_life: Adequate pain control and tolerated a regular diet.
